name: Space Wackos
short_description: Space Wackos is an online and local party shooter for 1-8 players. Featuring 2 game modes, over 10 maps and and over 12 game types, players have the freedom fight against each other in free-for-all or as a team in Coop and PVP games.
detailed_description:
Space Wackos is an online and local party shooter for 1-8 players. This low-poly shooter is easy to pickup and go. Inspired by the most popular shooters of the early 2000s, Space Wackos fully embraces casual gameplay and fully local 4-player Split screen for all your party needs.

Local 4-player Split Screen

Space Wackos embraces a lost feature in most modern shooters: Split Screen. It is designed to be playable with no internet and by simply plugging 4 controllers. Evoking the bygone era of couch shooters, Space Wackos is as easy as you can get for a party FPS offering both Coop and PVP that is downloadable in minutes.

Feature-Filled Multiplayer Experience

Online mode offers dozens of armor permutations, a ranking system, a leveling system on over 12 game types and 17 maps. These include many biomes and settings like a remote island, an abandoned temple, a frozen archipelago and a research facility in a swamp. You can also find many remakes of popular maps from one of the most revered shooter ever.
